hooks.prompt: Check if a file named '.gsd/state.json' exists relative to the current working directory. If it does NOT exist, respond with just: ok. If it exists, read it and check if any task has a status field equal to 'in_progress'. If no task is in_progress, respond with just: ok. If any task is in_progress, respond with exactly this JSON: {"decision": "block", "reason": "GSD: Task is still in_progress. Cannot stop until it completes or is marked blocked. Run /gsd-status to check progress."}

POST-TASK PROTOCOL CHECK: Run 'git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null' and 'git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null' to check for modified files. If no files were modified, respond with just: ok. If only files inside dev_docs/ were modified, respond with just: ok. If dev_docs/STATUS.md does not exist, respond with just: ok. Otherwise, check if code/content files (anything NOT in dev_docs/) were modified. If yes, check whether dev_docs/STATUS.md, dev_docs/handoff.md, and dev_docs/DEVLOG.md were ALSO modified (in diff or staged). If all three state files were updated, respond with just: ok. If any are missing, output: POST-TASK PROTOCOL: You completed work but did not update tracking files. Missing updates: [list only the missing ones from: STATUS.md, handoff.md, DEVLOG.md, tracker/master-tracker.md]. Update these files NOW before proceeding. Reference: 03-documentation/state-files/POST-TASK-PROTOCOL.md

PLAN CHANGE DETECTOR: Run 'git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null' and 'git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null' and 'git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null' to find modified files. Filter for planning files matching paths: dev_docs/tasks/, dev_docs/specs/, dev_docs/sprints/, dev_docs/completeness/, dev_docs/phases/. If no planning files were modified, respond with just: ok. If planning files WERE modified, check if dev_docs/STATUS.md AND dev_docs/DEVLOG.md were also modified this turn. If both were modified, respond with just: ok (trackers already updated). If trackers were NOT updated, output: PLAN CHANGE DETECTED: Planning files were modified but tracking files were not updated. Modified planning files: [list them]. You must update: STATUS.md (add/remove tasks, update counts), master-tracker.md (subtask rows), handoff.md (note plan change), DEVLOG.md (plan change entry). Run /plan-changed to update all trackers automatically.

SESSION COMPLETION CHECK: Check if dev_docs/STATUS.md exists. If it does NOT exist, respond with just: ok. If it exists, check the current conversation context for signs of session ending (user saying goodbye, ending session, or long pause). For every response: check if dev_docs/handoff.md was updated in the last 30 minutes by reading its content for a 'Last Updated' timestamp. If the timestamp is more than 2 hours old and code files were modified (check git diff), output: SESSION REMINDER: handoff.md has not been updated recently. Before ending this session, run /session-end to update STATUS.md, handoff.md, and DEVLOG.md. Otherwise respond with just: ok.

ARCH-ANCHOR CHECK: Run 'git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null' and 'git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null'. Check if any modified files match patterns: schema, migration, drizzle, prisma, auth, router, trpc, api/, middleware, proxy.ts, database. If no matches, respond with just: ok. If matches found, check if dev_docs/ARCH-ANCHOR.md was also modified. If ARCH-ANCHOR.md was modified, respond with just: ok. If ARCH-ANCHOR.md was NOT modified but architecture files were, output: ARCH-ANCHOR REMINDER: Architecture-affecting files were modified but dev_docs/ARCH-ANCHOR.md was not updated. Modified architecture files: [list them]. Update ARCH-ANCHOR.md if services, data model, API contracts, auth flow, or tech stack changed. If dev_docs/ARCH-ANCHOR.md does not exist, respond with just: ok.

Check if a file named '.gsd/state.json' exists relative to the current working directory. If it does NOT exist, output nothing. If it exists, read it and output exactly: GSD CONTEXT GUARD: State preserved in .gsd/state.json. Session [session_count] of project [project]. Progress: [completed]/[total] tasks. Last completed: [last completed task id if any]. To resume after compaction: invoke the gsd skill or type /gsd.

CONTEXT ANCHOR — PROCESS DISCIPLINE REMINDERS: Output the following block exactly:

CONTEXT ANCHOR — PROCESS DISCIPLINE REMINDERS
==============================================
MANDATORY after EVERY task/subtask completion:
1. Update dev_docs/STATUS.md (toggle checkbox, update phase %, update active task)
2. Update dev_docs/handoff.md (what was done, what's next, any blockers)
3. Append to dev_docs/DEVLOG.md (timestamped entry: task ID, outcome, files changed)
4. Update dev_docs/tracker/master-tracker.md (subtask status, if file exists)

MANDATORY after context compaction:
1. Read dev_docs/handoff.md FIRST — it has what you were doing and what's next
2. Read dev_docs/STATUS.md — current phase and progress
3. Read dev_docs/DEVLOG.md (last 3 entries) — recent work context
4. Announce what you found before doing any work

Before EVERY git commit:
- Verify STATUS.md, handoff.md, and DEVLOG.md are staged

PROCESS RULES:
- NEVER skip state file updates. They are part of the task, not overhead.
- NEVER claim done without proof artifacts.
- If resuming after a break, read handoff.md and STATUS.md first.
- If user provides an answer to a previous question, read handoff.md Blockers section, acknowledge the question, confirm resolution, update handoff.md, THEN continue.
==============================================

COMMIT STATE CHECK: Check if the current tool invocation is a Bash command containing 'git commit'. If it does NOT contain 'git commit', respond with just: ok. If it does contain 'git commit': Run 'git diff --cached --name-only' to list staged files. If dev_docs/STATUS.md does not exist, respond with just: ok. Separate staged files into code files (NOT in dev_docs/) and state files (dev_docs/STATUS.md, dev_docs/handoff.md, dev_docs/DEVLOG.md). If no code files are staged (state-only or docs-only commit), respond with just: ok. If code files ARE staged but NONE of dev_docs/STATUS.md, dev_docs/handoff.md, dev_docs/DEVLOG.md are staged, respond with: {"decision": "block", "reason": "COMMIT BLOCKED: State files are stale. You modified code but did not update tracking files. Missing from staging: STATUS.md, handoff.md, DEVLOG.md. Update these files and stage them before committing."}. If SOME but not all state files are staged, output a warning but allow: WARNING: Partial state file update. Missing: [list missing]. Proceeding with commit. If all state files are staged, respond with just: ok.
